item.title: Replying to @᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌ how in the world do you not know this?
item.description:
Replying to @᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌᠌ how in the world do you not know this? If you’re even vaguely pretending to talk about the issue he’s also a Zionist

item.title: #greenscreenvideo I’ll have sympathy for you when you at least start pretending to need it, or God forbid having it yourself
item.description:
#greenscreenvideo I’ll have sympathy for you when you at least start pretending to need it, or God forbid having it yourself

item.title: There is no way they think this is productive for America#greenscreenvideo

item.title: And that’s good BY THE WAY, the tragedy is not that America lost, the tragedy is that it exists
item.description:
And that’s good BY THE WAY, the tragedy is not that America lost, the tragedy is that it exists. - and it’s not over , they STILL ARE.

item.title: I get getting things wrong, if you are going to be critical of people for sharing things you perceive to be iranian propaganda y...
item.description:
I get getting things wrong, if you are going to be critical of people for sharing things you perceive to be iranian propaganda you must be critical of yourself when you share what does end up being pro imperial propaganda
